name: Menzoberranzan
description:
This bot was created for adventures in the city of Menzoberranzan - a huge underground city inhabited by drow - dark elves. Choose a character to play and plunge into your adventure through this huge city full of intrigue and secrets. You can be a slave who was dragged here from the surface, you can be one of the merchants who works as informants for one of the noble houses, you can be an assassin or a loyal cleric of Lolth - one of the daughters of a noble house.

Please take into account that the Lolth-sworn drow society is matriarchal and xenophobic. I don’t know exactly how the bot will react to non-drow oc's and men, but I wrote it down inside the personality.

This city, as well as the race, is part of the Forgotten Realms setting, one of the most popular worlds for playing Dungeons and Dragons.

Avatar - art of Menzoberranzan done by Sean Vo for The Legend of Drizzt.
creator: passacalia
